summary: Phase 10 — Ceremony Indian Cuisine template + dynamic upselling + chasing + enhanced IVR TwiML. All 13 new backend tests pass (test_zivio_phase10_ceremony.py). Frontend verified: 7th 'bts-ceremony' card renders with icon 🎉, clicking it swaps --gold to #EF6B2E, sidebar/topbar/subtitle all update to Ceremony. Theme correctly reverts to default #C8952A on restaurant switch. Content screens reflect Ceremony-specific features (Smart Upselling, Customer Chasing, 'cloned voice' compare row). Admin shows Voice IVR + /api/webhook/twilio/voice. Pricing $599 on every screen. VOICE_CLONE_SCRIPT.md contains all three language sections + ElevenLabs upload steps.
critical_code_review_comments: Ceremony template theme { --gold: #EF6B2E, ... } applied via App.js useEffect is working correctly, and the cleanup function removes overrides so switching templates properly reverts to defaults — verified in browser.

build_system_prompt now has distinct DYNAMIC UPSELLING + CHASING blocks for both WhatsApp/chat and is_call paths; live LLM replies honor them (butter chicken → naan, biryani → lassi, paneer tikka → main-course nudge, 'umm let me think' → gentle chase, not generic 'how can I help').
routes/voice_ivr.py <Gather> now includes enhanced="true" and profanityFilter="false" as required — confirmed via direct POST to /api/webhook/twilio/voice returning TwiML.

Minor: ceremony template's problem/solution/flows copy is largely the same wording as the restaurant template (except some Ceremony-specific flavor). The distinctive phrase 'Celebrate the Taste of the India' lives only in topbar tagline + brand_tagline, not in the presentation screens. Consider weaving it into the eyebrow/title of Ceremony's Problem/Solution if stronger brand re-skin is desired — not blocking.
Minor: chat_sessions dict in core.py still unbounded — same observation as iteration_9. Not blocking.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 phase10) — /api/, /api/restaurant/default, /api/analytics/summary, /api/orders, /api/voice/status, /api/tts (MISS→HIT), /api/webhook/twilio/voice (TwiML with enhanced+profanityFilter), system prompt DYNAMIC UPSELLING+CHASING+human fillers, live chat upselling (naan/lassi/main), chase behavior — ALL GREEN
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the checks run — 7-template grid includes bts-ceremony 🎉, click swaps --gold to #EF6B2E, sidebar brand='Ceremony Indian Cuisine', topbar tagline='Celebrate the Taste of the India', subtitle='CEREMONY INDIAN CUISINE — DEMO'. Restaurant click reverts --gold to #C8952A. Pricing $599 on features/compare/pricing. Admin shows Voice IVR + /api/webhook/twilio/voice URL. No console errors.

seed_data_creation: Applied restaurant template via Business Templates UI click to restore default after Ceremony swap (optional — each template-click does a PUT /api/restaurant/default).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 10 adds a 7th business template (ceremony) with its own theme object applied via CSS custom properties in App.js useEffect. All 6 prior templates still work and correctly reset --gold to #C8952A. Dynamic upselling + chasing enforced at the system-prompt level — verified by sending 'butter chicken' (→naan), 'chicken biryani' (→lassi), 'paneer tikka' (→main), 'umm let me think' (→chase). Voice IVR <Gather> now includes enhanced="true" profanityFilter="false" for better speech recognition. /app/VOICE_CLONE_SCRIPT.md contains English + Hindi + Punjabi sections + ElevenLabs upload instructions. Twilio creds still unchanged — in dev mode signature validation is SKIPPED with a WARNING (per iteration_9). ChatPanel TTS-dedupe was not re-measured in this run because the Playwright locator timed out after template-switch re-render; iteration_9 already validated it and the ChatPanel code was not modified in this phase.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All requested features land cleanly.
